game_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero
notes: Wikipedia source documents composer (Bob Vieira) and basic game info, but contains no detailed music parameters (tempo, keys, chord progressions, time signatures, modes, energy levels, melodic characteristics, or SFX specifications). Game features vehicular combat sections and one-on-one melee battles across geographical locations (woods, desert, arctic tundra) but audio documentation for these areas is not available in provided sources.
